metadata.name: Docker Compose Usage Guide
metadata.purpose: Complete guide for using Docker Compose across all Ectropy environments (development, staging, production) with infrastructure management and service orchestration
metadata.author: DevOps / Infrastructure Team

executiveSummary.description: Comprehensive operational guide for managing Docker Compose configurations across all Ectropy environments. Covers infrastructure-only deployments for fast development, full-stack containerized deployments, and production orchestration with 6 distinct compose files.
keyChanges: Standardized 6 compose files with clear purposes
Consolidated development.override into main development file
prerequisites: Docker Desktop or Docker Engine installed
Docker Compose v2+ (docker compose, not docker-compose)

preFlightChecks.name: Docker Installation
preFlightChecks.description: Verify Docker is installed and running
preFlightChecks.expectedResult: Docker version displayed and daemon responding

onFailure.message: Docker must be installed and running. Install Docker Desktop or Docker Engine.

preFlightChecks.name: Docker Compose v2 Check
preFlightChecks.description: Verify Docker Compose v2 is available
preFlightChecks.expectedResult: Docker Compose version v2.x.x or higher

onFailure.message: Docker Compose v2+ required. Update Docker Desktop or install docker-compose-plugin.

preFlightChecks.name: Environment File Validation
preFlightChecks.description: Check if required .env file exists for selected compose configuration
preFlightChecks.expectedResult: At least one environment file exists

onFailure.message: Consider creating .env file from template for proper configuration

preFlightChecks.name: Port Availability Check
preFlightChecks.description: Verify key ports are not in use

onFailure.message: Some ports may be in use. Stop conflicting services or modify port mappings.

preFlightChecks.name: Disk Space Check
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure sufficient disk space for Docker images and volumes
preFlightChecks.command: df -h / | awk 'NR==2 {print $4}' | sed 's/G//' | awk '{if($1>10) exit 0; else exit 1}'

onFailure.message: Low disk space detected. Consider cleaning up Docker resources with 'docker system prune'

phases.name: Local Development - Infrastructure Only
phases.description: Run databases in Docker, applications on host for fast iteration and debugging

steps.name: Copy Infrastructure Environment Template
steps.description: Create .env.infra from example template
steps.purpose: Initialize environment configuration for infrastructure services

onFailure.message: File may already exist or template missing

steps.name: Start Infrastructure Services
steps.description: Start PostgreSQL, Redis, and Qdrant in Docker
steps.purpose: Launch database and cache infrastructure for local development

onFailure.message: Failed to start infrastructure services. Check Docker logs.

steps.name: Verify Database Health
steps.description: Wait for PostgreSQL to be ready to accept connections
steps.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.infra.yml exec postgres pg_isready -U ectropy
steps.purpose: Ensure database is fully initialized before running applications

steps.name: Start Applications on Host
steps.description: Run Ectropy applications using pnpm on host machine
steps.purpose: Launch applications with hot-reload and debugging capabilities

phases.name: Full Stack Development - All Services in Docker
phases.description: Run complete stack in Docker for environment parity with staging

steps.name: Copy Development Environment Template
steps.description: Create .env.development from example
steps.purpose: Initialize full-stack environment configuration

steps.name: Start Full Development Stack
steps.description: Launch all services including web-dashboard, api-gateway, mcp-server, databases
steps.purpose: Create isolated development environment with all services containerized

steps.name: Verify Services Health
steps.description: Check health endpoints for all application services
steps.purpose: Validate all services are responding correctly

steps.name: View Logs
steps.description: Monitor service logs for errors or warnings
steps.purpose: Real-time monitoring of all service output

phases.name: Add Monitoring Stack (Optional)
phases.description: Deploy Prometheus and Grafana for observability

steps.name: Start Monitoring with Infrastructure
steps.description: Add monitoring to infrastructure-only setup
steps.purpose: Enable metrics collection and visualization for infrastructure services

steps.name: Access Grafana Dashboard
steps.description: Open Grafana at http://localhost:3003 (admin/admin)
steps.purpose: Access monitoring dashboards and metrics visualization

phases.name: Database Management Operations
phases.description: Common database operations and maintenance tasks

steps.name: Connect to PostgreSQL
steps.description: Open psql shell in database container
steps.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.infra.yml exec postgres psql -U ectropy -d ectropy_dev
steps.purpose: Direct database access for queries and debugging

steps.name: Run Database Migrations
steps.description: Apply Prisma migrations to database schema
steps.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.development.yml exec api-gateway pnpm prisma migrate deploy
steps.purpose: Update database schema to latest version

steps.name: Generate Prisma Client
steps.description: Regenerate Prisma TypeScript client
steps.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.development.yml exec api-gateway pnpm prisma generate
steps.purpose: Update TypeScript types for database models

phases.name: Service Management and Troubleshooting
phases.description: Common operations for managing and debugging services

steps.name: Restart Single Service
steps.description: Restart specific service without affecting others
steps.purpose: Apply configuration changes or recover from errors

steps.name: Rebuild Service After Code Changes
steps.description: Rebuild Docker image and restart service
steps.purpose: Deploy code changes to containerized service

steps.name: View Service Logs
steps.description: Stream logs from specific service
steps.purpose: Debug issues and monitor service behavior

steps.name: Check Container Health Status
steps.description: Display status of all containers
steps.purpose: Identify unhealthy or stopped containers
steps.expectedOutput: List of containers with status and ports

steps.name: Full Rebuild from Scratch
steps.description: Clean rebuild with no cache for troubleshooting
steps.purpose: Resolve persistent issues by completely rebuilding environment

phases.name: Cleanup and Resource Management
phases.description: Stop services and clean up Docker resources

steps.name: Stop Services (Keep Data)
steps.description: Stop containers but preserve volumes
steps.purpose: Gracefully stop services while retaining database data

steps.name: Stop and Remove Containers
steps.description: Stop and remove containers, keep volumes
steps.purpose: Clean up containers while preserving persistent data

steps.name: Full Cleanup (Remove Volumes)
steps.description: Stop, remove containers and delete all volumes for fresh start
steps.purpose: Complete environment reset including database data

steps.name: Clean Docker System
steps.description: Remove unused Docker resources to free disk space
steps.purpose: Reclaim disk space from stopped containers, unused images, and volumes

steps.name: Stop All Services
steps.purpose: Terminate all running containers

steps.name: Verify Cleanup
steps.purpose: Confirm no Ectropy containers are running

steps.name: Restore Previous Configuration
steps.purpose: Revert to last known good configuration

verification.successCriteria: No containers running or all in healthy state

successCriteria.criterion: All infrastructure services (postgres, redis, qdrant) are running and healthy
successCriteria.validation: docker compose ps shows all containers in 'Up' state

successCriteria.criterion: Application services respond to health checks within 60 seconds

successCriteria.validation: Prisma migrate deploy exits with code 0

successCriteria.criterion: No error messages in container logs
successCriteria.validation: docker compose logs shows no ERROR or FATAL level messages

supportedQueries.query: How do I start infrastructure services for development?
supportedQueries.purpose: Guide developers to start databases without full containerization

supportedQueries.query: What's the command to start the full development stack?
supportedQueries.purpose: Quick reference for full-stack Docker deployment

supportedQueries.query: How do I add monitoring to my development environment?
How do I rebuild a service after code changes?
supportedQueries.returns: Phase 5, Step 5.2: Rebuild Service After Code Changes
supportedQueries.purpose: Deploy code changes to containerized services

supportedQueries.query: What ports are used by Ectropy services?
supportedQueries.returns: Web:3000, MCP:3001/3002, Grafana:3003, API:4000, Postgres:5432, Redis:6379, Qdrant:6333/6334
supportedQueries.purpose: Port allocation reference for debugging conflicts

supportedQueries.query: How do I clean up Docker resources?
supportedQueries.purpose: Free disk space and reset environment

decisionSupport: Choose infrastructure-only (docker-compose.infra.yml) for fast development with hot-reload
Choose full stack (docker-compose.development.yml) for environment parity with staging
Add monitoring stack when diagnosing performance issues or testing metrics
Use 'down -v' for complete cleanup including database data
Run health checks after any service restart or rebuild

architectureAlignment.routingConfig: Port mappings align with routing-architecture.json service definitions
architectureAlignment.portAllocation: Follows standardized port scheme: Web(3xxx), API(4xxx), DB(5xxx), Cache(6xxx)
architectureAlignment.oauthConfig: Environment variables must include OAuth callback URLs for Speckle integration

knownIssues.title: Port Already in Use
knownIssues.impact: Service fails to start due to port conflict
knownIssues.mitigation: Use lsof -i :PORT (macOS/Linux) or netstat (Windows) to identify conflicting process
knownIssues.action: Stop conflicting service or modify port mapping in compose file

knownIssues.title: Database Connection Refused on First Start
knownIssues.impact: Application services may fail before database is ready
knownIssues.mitigation: PostgreSQL takes 10-15 seconds to initialize on first start
knownIssues.action: Wait for database health check or restart dependent services

knownIssues.title: Docker Images Consume Disk Space
knownIssues.impact: Build failures or slow performance due to low disk space
knownIssues.mitigation: Regularly run 'docker system prune' to clean unused resources
knownIssues.action: Monitor Docker Desktop storage usage in Settings → Resources
